_meta.description: Editorial bridge between the site's 20-region vocabulary (lib/regions.ts) and the HCP-MMP-360 parcellation (Glasser 2016) used by the brain visualization underneath. Each RegionId maps to a curated list of Glasser parcels; the visualization uses the parcel granularity, the editorial copy keeps speaking the 20-region vocabulary.
_meta.subcortical_note: Glasser HCP-MMP is cortical only. amyg_left, amyg_right have no parcel proxy and map to an empty array; pages with amygdala in their signature fall back to the 20-region rendering path. hipp_left, hipp_right are approximated by parahippocampal + entorhinal + presubiculum + Glasser's H (hippocampal complex).
